markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's content engine for scaling Gladia's content production.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Scale content production to meet AI search demands, not for strategic guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Concern:** Potential conflict of interest, as GrowthX's CEO is the former CMO of DeepGram, a direct Gladia competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX's white-glove service uses an 8-week sprint to build a custom content engine, then produces 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Process:** The engine uses "artifacts" (brand voice, ICP) and agentic pipelines to automate research, drafting, and fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

## Topics

### Gladia's Content Challenge

  - [**Primary Need:** Scale content production to meet AI search demands.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Secondary Need:** Optimize content for LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Current State:** A lean team with a hybrid content process (manual + AI).](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Goal:** Outsource end-to-end content creation to a single partner.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

### Potential Conflict of Interest

  - [**Issue:** GrowthX's CEO, Marcel, is the former CMO of DeepGram, a direct competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**GrowthX Policy:** Strict siloing of competitive accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Separate teams and workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [No data or information sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Context:** GrowthX also works with DeepGram, which hired them to get Marcel back.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### GrowthX's Solution & Process

  - [**Origin:** Marcel built the solution he wanted as a CMO, inspired by his success at DeepGram (24x traffic, 4x revenue).](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Model:** A white-glove service combining an internal platform (Atlas) with a team of experts (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief).](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**Two-Phase Partnership:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-week sprint):**](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
          - [**Weeks 1–3:** Ingest resources → Develop custom "artifacts" (brand voice, ICP) → Create content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
          - [**Weeks 4–8:** Publish 10–20 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing):** Produce 5 articles/week (new or refresh).](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**Platform (Atlas):** An internal tool that uses custom artifacts and agentic pipelines to automate content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
      - [**Agentic Workflows:** Pipelines self-correct (e.g., re-run research if quality scores are not met).](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** A dedicated step extracts passages and performs deep research to validate accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [**Client Access:** The platform is currently internal-only. A future self-serve model will be less expensive.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

### Client Examples & Fit

  - [**Augment Code:** Grew from 20k to 60k+ monthly organic traffic, enabling them to compete with GitHub.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Lovable:** Built a custom pipeline in 3–4 weeks to create programmatic app templates.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [**Early-Stage Clients:** Strong results with seed/Series A companies.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [**Tiro:** Significant traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
      - **CERN:** Grew from \<5k to 100k+ monthly organic traffic.
  - [**Fit for Startups:** The model works well for startups. The main bottleneck is often client perfectionism, which can slow down the necessary volume for AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send resources, pricing, and the competitive policy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [**Gladia Team:** Discuss internally and follow up with Tyler early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLtn1_EWiyj_5Mnr15GeGfggsvdcZDmY?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
